step1_title: Pull up a chair by the fire
step1_desc: Your AI Game Master is waiting at the table. They will weave the story, run the world, and roll the dice. No party required - just bring your imagination.
step2_tag: Step 2 - The voice of the DM
step2_desc: Cloud is faster. Local is private and works offline.
local_setup_hint: Local model setup happens in Settings -> Provider tab after onboarding. You can choose a Qwen3.5 variant and start the embedded runtime there.
step3_desc: Pick a class - you can fill in the rest later, or take a ready-made character.
class_fighter_desc: Master of martial combat. Heavy armor, big weapons, second wind.
class_wizard_desc: Scholar of arcane magic. Spellbook, rituals, control the battlefield.
class_rogue_desc: Sneaky, clever, deadly. Sneak attack, expertise, cunning action.
class_cleric_desc: Divine champion. Healing, support, righteous might.
validation_invalid_url: must be a valid http(s) URL
